mapper.sql: from sys_major_catalog m join sys_dict_item d on d.id = m.category_dict_item_id where m.deleted = 0 and d.deleted = 0
mapper.select:
select count(*)
and (m.major_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or m.major_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or d.dict_label like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

select m.id, m.major_code, m.major_name, m.category_dict_item_id, d.dict_label as category_label
order by d.sort_no, m.major_name
mapper.insert: insert into sys_major_catalog (major_code, major_name, category_dict_item_id, deleted) values (#{majorCode}, #{majorName}, #{categoryDictItemId}, 0)
mapper.update: update sys_major_catalog set deleted = 1 where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.select: select count(*) from sys_major_catalog where category_dict_item_id = #{categoryDictItemId} and deleted = 0
select count(*) from youth_info where major_code = #{majorCode} and deleted = 0
